channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Women With Acromegaly Face Greater Disease Burden Than Men
item.description: Women with acromegaly experience a significantly higher disease burden and poorer physical and mental quality of life than men. Medscape UK

item.title: Can virtual mirrors fix hospital patient bottlenecks?
item.description: An article titled "How Digital Twins Can Improve Health System Operations," written by Mark Crawford, explores how virtual replicas of entire hospital...

item.title: Prolonged Latency After Term PROM Tied to Maternal Infection
item.description: Latency beyond 12 hours after term prelabour rupture of membranes is independently linked to a higher likelihood of maternal intrauterine infection, e...

item.title: What Predicts Death After Surgery for Aortic Endocarditis?
item.description: Urgent surgery and preoperative haemodynamic instability strongly predict in-hospital death in native aortic valve endocarditis. Medscape UK
